Corwyn Velaryon was the eldest son and heir of Lord Daemon Velaryon,[3][2] the Lord of the Tides and the head of House Velaryon during the reign of King Maegor I Targaryen and King Jaehaerys I Targaryen.[4][3]

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Family
    • 2.1 Ancestors
    • 2.2 Descendants
  • 3 References

History[ ]

When King Jaehaerys I Targaryen and Queen Alysanne Targaryen flew their dragons to Driftmark and toured the shipyards, they were escorted by Corwyn and his brothers Jorgen and Victor.[3]

As Corwyn predeceased his father, his eldest son, Ser Corlys,[2] succeeded Lord Daemon as the Lord of the Tides and Master of Driftmark.[5][6]
